# pylatexenc

Vendored from `phfaist/pylatexenc` because `python-bibtexparser` uses it for LaTeX-aware BibTeX parsing.

Tremotino loads this package from `mcp/tremotino_mcp.py` alongside `python-bibtexparser` so bibliography import works without requiring a global Python install.

Upstream: https://github.com/phfaist/pylatexenc
License: MIT, see `LICENSE.txt`.
